creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 246751
py-social-auth-core-4.5.1.patch

Hi Richard,

attached is a patch that updates security/py-social-auth-core to 4.5.1.

Changes to the port:
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
- Fold the "OPENID" options as security/py-python-jose is fully substituted by security/py-pyjwt since the 4.5.0 release.

QA:
~~~
- poudriere -> OK (12.4-RELEASE amd64, py38, py39, py310, py311)

Results of "make test" (py38 - py311):
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
> ==== 581 passed, 7 warnings in 42.67s ====
